question.label: Highest-leverage work
question.name: You said 'highest-leverage work' — what work do you think should have had more of you?
question.description: Drills into his own leverage example so the conversation moves from self-read into concrete evidence.

answer: I can describe Principal impact in general, but this team's bar still feels fuzzy.

assessment.note: He names a clear role-expectation problem: he can define Principal impact abstractly, but not this team's actual bar.

new_queue.label: Team bar fuzzy
new_queue.name: What specifically feels fuzzy about this team's Principal bar?

new_queue.label: Principal impact evidence
new_queue.name: What have you done recently that best shows Principal-level leverage on this team?

new_queue.label: Gap awareness
new_queue.name: Where do you think you've fallen short of where you want to be?

new_queue.label: Question-asking pattern
new_queue.name: What makes you hold back from asking questions early?

new_queue.label: Next behavior change
new_queue.name: What is the first change you want to make before our next check-in?

history.answer_excerpt: I think I am shipping, but I am not sure I am aiming at the highest-leverage work yet.
